summary: Base W8 — scheduled −30% deload (~14 mpw) and the first week under the v4.3 mileage reshape (peak 38→28 mpw; all quality preserved, Adj #67). The week's one hard run (3×6 @ T) ran Wed: 7:45/7:56/7:47 at RPE 7 = 2nd straight T quick of the 8:00 lock → T target nudged to 7:50–7:55 for W9 Tue (Adj #77). Two reactive tendons drove the posture — L Achilles (Adj #63) + R patellar (Adj #64): Vomero on easy/long runs, hill strides held (Adj #44), W9 step-up held until both tendons read AM-clean (Adj #65/#67). Fri (Adj #79 pull, Hyp B run fresh) LOGGED: lat 150→155 and pushdown 20→22.5/arm landed on reps with set-3 failures (holds, Adj #80/#84); chest-supp row 90 FAILED fresh (8/4/5 all RIR 0) → revert 85, true ceiling (Adj #81); Sat DB lateral established 30 (Adj #82); preacher 60 hold cleared → 65 next (Adj #83). Sat 6/13 LOGGED: deload long 45 min @ 10:42 (HR 163/169, cadence 169; Achilles clean during, both knees flared mid-run only/gone post, SI mild AM/resolved) + the punted mini-circuit cleared the backlog — calf owed dose 325×12/12/11 with NO Achilles pain (first clean calf-loaded read of the reactive stretch, set 3 to failure though), chest fly REINTRODUCED to Hyp B (130×12/10, Adj #88), decline crunch took its Sat-slot debut at BW. AM tendon reads turned clean Fri + Sat (ledger Tue sore / Wed clean / Thu sore / Fri clean / Sat clean = 3 of 5, trending clean). The Sun 6/14 W8→W9 boundary (Adj #65/#67/#87) reads the final AM: Achilles has settled (Fri+Sat clean) but the knee went bilateral DURING Sat's run (escalation from right-patellar-only) — clean Sun AM argues a shallow W9 step toward ~18–20 mpw with the knee watched; still-reactive argues repeat-deload.

days.note: Logged — 30 min, treadmill 1%, 10:45/mi (Z1 ceiling), cadence 168, HR avg 160/peak 168. SI clean; L Achilles pain-free during, R knee quiet (first no-signal read since #63) — AM read not given, holds persist (Adj #70).

Logged — Incline AMRAP re-test 135×10 RIR 0 → e1RM 180, new TM 162 (Adj #71); DB lat first 6-set dose @ 30 held (#72); preacher 60 hold persists (#73); pushdown SWAPPED to unilateral cable 20/arm, clean (#74, elbow #75); crunch BW holds. L Achilles NOT AM-clean, R knee clean (#76).

Logged — 3×6 @ 7:45/7:56/7:47 (HR avgs 175/177/180) RPE 7/RIR 2, outdoor, Zoom Fly 6. 2nd straight T quick of 8:00 → T target nudged 7:50–7:55 for W9 Tue (Adj #77). AM all-green; very minor Achilles early, resolved mid-run.

Logged — 25 min, treadmill 1%, 10:43/mi, HR avg 168 (hot for easy — anchor by pace, Adj #9). SI clean. TENDONS REGRESSED: L Achilles AM sore = NOT AM-clean; R patellar signal DURING, first since 6/6 (Adj #78).

days.session: Hyp B (Adj #79 pull; run skipped, calf + abs punted)
days.note: Logged — lat 155 landed-on-reps hold (#80); row 90 FAILED → revert 85 (#81); Sat DB lat established 30 (#82); preacher 60 cleared → 65 next (#83); pushdown 22.5/arm landed-on-reps hold, elbow mild ≤4/10 (#84); calf + abs punted to Sat, post-lift run SKIPPED (#85). AM reads BOTH tendons clean — ledger 2/4 (#86).

days.session: Long Z1 45 min + punted calf/abs mini-circuit (Adj #85)
days.note: Logged — deload long 45 min @ 10:42 (treadmill 1%, HR 163/169, cadence 169; Achilles clean during, both knees flared mid-run only/gone post, SI mild AM/resolved). Mini-circuit: calf 325×12/12/11 owed dose (set 3 to failure but NO Achilles pain, #87); chest fly REINTRODUCED 130×12/10 (#88); decline crunch Sat debut BW 3×10 hold (#66). AM Achilles + knees clean = Fri+Sat both AM-clean.

days.session: Off / SI prehab — W8→W9 boundary day
days.note: AM recheck BOTH tendons (Achilles + knees) + SI. Ledger: Achilles AM-clean Fri+Sat (trending clean), but knees went bilateral DURING Sat's run (escalation from right-patellar-only). Clean Sun AM = shallow W9 step-up ~18–20 mpw with knee watched (§4.C); still reactive = repeat a deload-level week (Adj #65/#67/#87). Tyler 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3, daily SI prehab; walking fine.
